scenario.key_phrase: I've been watching Alakh sir's videos and want to join

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! This is Priya from PhysicsWallah sales team. Am I speaking with Suresh?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan yes, this is Suresh. I've been watching Alakh sir's videos on YouTube and I'm really interested in joining PW for my preparation!

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's wonderful to hear! Alakh sir ki videos really help students a lot. Can you tell me which class you're currently in and what exam you're preparing for?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in Class 12 right now and preparing for NEET. Alakh sir ke physics concepts are so clear, but I need more structured preparation for all subjects.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! NEET preparation ke liye humara NEET Yakeen batch bahut popular hai. When is your NEET exam? Is it this year in 2025 or next year?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: It's this year only - in May 2025. So I have around 5 months left. I'm quite worried about the time, but I'm very motivated to study hard!

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: 5 months is actually good time if you study consistently! For NEET 2025, I'd recommend our NEET Yakeen batch - it has structured lectures, test series, and doubt solving. What's your budget range for the course?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Budget is not a major issue for me. My parents are supportive and we can invest in good coaching. What all does the NEET Yakeen batch include exactly? And how much does it cost?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul! NEET Yakeen 2027 batch costs ₹33,999 with EMI option of ₹3,299/month through PW Pay. It includes complete Physics, Chemistry, Biology lectures, weekly tests, previous year papers, and 24x7 doubt support. All subjects are covered comprehensively.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Wait, you said 2027 batch - but I need it for 2025! Do you have a batch specifically for 2025 NEET? And can I access it immediately after enrollment?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Oh sorry for the confusion! Yes, we absolutely have NEET 2025 batches available. The crash course for NEET 2025 with 5 months intensive preparation would be perfect for you. It's ₹24,999 and you get immediate access. Theek hai?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: That sounds great! ₹24,999 is totally fine. Can I make the decision right now? I don't need to ask anyone else - my parents already told me to choose whatever course I feel is best.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Excellent! I'm so happy you're taking charge of your preparation. Since you can decide independently, shall I help you with the enrollment process right now? You'll get login details within 15 minutes and can start studying today itself!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes absolutely! I'm very excited to start. How do I make the payment? Can I pay the full amount right now or should I go with EMI? What's the next step?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! You can pay full amount or choose EMI of ₹2,499/month. I'll send you a payment link on WhatsApp right after this call. Once payment is done, you'll get welcome email with login details. Ready to become a PW student?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, I'm ready! I'll go with the full payment of ₹24,999. Please send me the WhatsApp link. Thank you so much Priya, I'm really excited to start my NEET journey with PW!
